title: Rich Moroccan Crustaceans Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix, rich and fluffy Moroccan dish featuring crustaceans that's also paleo-friendly.

ingredients.name: Crustaceans (shrimp or crab meat)
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water to reduce saltiness

instructions: Soak the crustaceans in water for at least an hour to reduce saltiness.
Toast cumin seeds lightly in a dry pan until fragrant. Let cool and grind into powder.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sautéing until soft.
Add palm sugar and stir-fry for 2 minutes or until slightly caramelized.
Fold in ground cumin seeds and toast gently to release flavor.
Stir in chopped coriander leaves and crustaceans, pouring lemon juice over them. Cook for another minute allowing flavors to meld.
Serve hot with a side of paleo-friendly bread if desired.
